body:
## Summary
- Add `docs/agent-capability-smoke.md` with six bullets describing the sandbox Sepo Agent smoke test.
- Keep the change documentation-only, with no workflow, config, secret, dependency, or production behavior changes.

## Verification
- Sepo Agent run `26273964616` completed the implementation and committed the branch.
- Agent reported `git status --short --untracked-files=all` showed only `docs/agent-capability-smoke.md`.
- Agent reported `find docs -maxdepth 2 -type f -print` showed only `docs/agent-capability-smoke.md`.
- Agent reported bullet count check returned `6`.

Closes #10.
title: Add agent capability smoke test note
